query:
You are a product analyst building a feature comparison matrix. The subject is the subject company (). Compare it against the 1 competitors below.

Competitors:
  1. name="Linear", website="linear.app"

STEP 1 — Identify 6 to 10 KEY FEATURES that matter when comparing these products. Group them by category (Core / Pricing / Integrations / Enterprise / Mobile). Return as 'features' array with {label, group}. The SAME features list must be used to score every competitor — choose features that are meaningful for all.

STEP 2 — For EACH competitor, return a 'capabilities' array with one entry per feature defined in step 1. Each entry: {feature: '<exact label>', value: '<one of full/part/none/soon>'}. 'full' = covered with a dedicated feature. 'part' = partial / limited coverage. 'none' = not supported. 'soon' = on public roadmap.

STEP 3 — For EACH competitor, also return notable_customers: 3-5 publicly known customers with {name, domain, segment (Grand compte/ETI/PME/Startup/Consumer), industry, evidence (case study URL or quote)}.

Omit any capability you cannot verify — do NOT guess. Return one competitor object per company in the SAME order as the input list. Preserve company names EXACTLY.
answer:
{"answer": "```json
{
  "features": [
    {"label": "Issue & Sprint Tracking", "group": "Core"},
    {"label": "Roadmap & Project Planning", "group": "Core"},
    {"label": "AI-Powered Workflows", "group": "Core"},
    {"label": "Free Tier Availability", "group": "Pricing"},
    {"label": "Developer Tool Integrations", "group": "Integrations"},
    {"label": "Communication & Support Integrations", "group": "Integrations"},
    {"label": "SSO & SCIM Provisioning", "group": "Enterprise"},
    {"label": "Compliance & Data Residency", "group": "Enterprise"},
    {"label": "Native Mobile App", "group": "Mobile"}
  ],
  "competitors": [
    {
      "name": "Linear",
      "capabilities": [
        {"feature": "Issue & Sprint Tracking", "value": "full"},
        {"feature": "Roadmap & Project Planning", "value": "full"},
        {"feature": "AI-Powered Workflows", "value": "full"},
        {"feature": "Free Tier Availability", "value": "full"},
        {"feature": "Developer Tool Integrations", "value": "full"},
        {"feature": "Communication & Support Integrations", "value": "full"},
        {"feature": "SSO & SCIM Provisioning", "value": "full"},
        {"feature": "Compliance & Data Residency", "value": "full"},
        {"feature": "Native Mobile App", "value": "full"}
      ],
      "notable_customers": [
        {
          "name": "OpenAI",
          "domain": "openai.com",
          "segment": "Grand compte",
          "industry": "AI",
          "evidence": "https://linear.app/customers/openai - \"Why OpenAI chose Linear and scaled to 3,000 users\""
        },
        {
          "name": "Cash App",
          "domain": "cash.app",
          "segment": "Grand compte",
          "industry": "Fintech",
          "evidence": "https://linear.app/customers/cashapp - Featured customer story on Linear Customers page"
        },
        {

          "domain": "vercel.com",
          "segment": "ETI",
          "industry": "SaaS",
          "evidence": "https://linear.app/customers - Featured SaaS/AI customer on Linear Customers page"
        },
        {

          "segment": "ETI",
          "industry": "Fintech",

        },
        {

          "industry": "AI",
          "evidence": "https://linear.app/customers/scale - Featured customer story on Linear Customers page"
        }
      ]
    }
  ]
}
```

**Feature Scoring Rationale for Linear:**

| Feature | Value | Evidence |
|---|---|---|
| Issue & Sprint Tracking | full | Dedicated issue tracking with cycle (sprint) planning; core product functionality ([43]) |
| Roadmap & Project Planning | full | Projects, initiatives, and roadmap views built in ([43]) |
| AI-Powered Workflows | full | Linear Agent (beta), Triage Intelligence, Code Intelligence (beta), Linear Asks on Business+ plans ([5]) |
| Free Tier Availability | full | Free plan at $0 with unlimited members, 2 teams, 250 issues ([5]) |
| Developer Tool Integrations | full | Native integrations with GitHub, GitLab, Figma, Sentry; full API and webhook access ([22]) |
| Communication & Support Integrations | full | Native Slack, Zendesk, Intercom, Front integrations ([30]) |
| SSO & SCIM Provisioning | full | SAML 2.0 SSO and SCIM provisioning available on Enterprise plan ([35], [5]) |
| Compliance & Data Residency | full | SOC 2 Type II, GDPR, HIPAA (BAA on Enterprise), EU/US data residency selection, encryption at rest and in transit ([10]) |
| Native Mobile App | full | Native iOS and Android apps with issue creation, comments, inbox, notifications ([11]) |

**Note:** The subject company field was empty in the input (no name or website provided), so only the Linear competitor object is returned.

excerpts:
Linear's [Integration Directory](https://linear.app/integrations) features apps and add-ons created by the Linear team as well as external applications. Install these to improve your workflow and sync with your favorite tools.
Use Linear's API to build your own integration and submit it to the directory following the instructions below. We recommend building applications using OAuth
You can install them via the link in the directory or by going to [_Settings > Workspace > Integrations_](https://linear.app/settings/integrations/github) and then select the integration name.

### Linear crafted
If you see an integration with a star badge on the icon, that means it was crafted by the Linear team. You can install them via the link in the directory or by going to [_Settings > Workspace > Integrations_](https://linear.app/settings/integrations/github) and then select the integration name.
